articles.title: VOLTRON DATA ACQUIRES CLAYPOT
articles.summary: The enterprise data toolkit acquired Claypot's real-time AI tools and team for an undisclosed sum. Voltron aims to continue bringing access to data to the enterprise.

articles.title: FTC INVESTIGATING MICROSOFT, AMAZON, AND GOOGLE INVESTMENTS INTO OPENAI AND ANTHROPIC
articles.summary: The Federal Trade Commission opened an inquiry into the investments of Big Tech companies that provide cloud services to smaller AI companies like OpenAI and Anthropic.

articles.title: GOOGLE’S NEW AI IS LEARNING TO DIAGNOSE PATIENTS
articles.summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI model called AMIE (Articulate Medical Intelligence Explorer) to assist in healthcare. Trained on medical texts and dialogues, AMIE will provide explanations of medical conditions and potentially aid in diagnostics. AMIE outperformed human physicians in a controlled trial. Its effectiveness in real-world scenarios remains to be tested.

articles.title: IMP V1 3B MULTIMODAL MODEL
articles.summary: Another multimodal model trained on Phi-2 and SigLIP. This one achieves extremely promising performance and is small enough to run on-device.

articles.title: MATRYOSHKA REPRESENTATION LEARNING
articles.summary: OpenAI's new embeddings can change size based on your needs. This is theorized to be due to the nesting doll method of learning, which learns features at various granularity.

articles.title: MEDICAL VIDEO SEGMENTATION
articles.summary: Vivim is a new framework for medical video object segmentation that effectively processes long video sequences. Vivim compresses spatiotemporal data efficiently utilizing the state space model approach, delivering faster and more accurate segmentation results compared to traditional methods.

articles.title: HUGGINGFACE WEBDATASET
articles.summary: WebDataset is a format that combines multiple records together. Anything with the same prefix is treated as an instance. It is ideal for streaming and fast data loading.

articles.title: LLMS FROM SCRATCH
articles.summary: An incomplete but promising set of tasks for learning how to build language models from scratch.

articles.title: MULTIMODAL PATHWAY: TRANSFORMERS WITH IRRELEVANT DATA FROM OTHER MODALITIES
articles.summary: This project proposes a novel approach for enhancing transformers that uses unrelated data from different modalities, such as improving an image model using audio data. Multimodal Pathway uniquely connects transformers of two different modalities, allowing a target modality to benefit from the strengths of another.

articles.title: EXPLORING COLBERT AND RAGATOUILLE
articles.summary: ColBERT is an excellent model for embedding queries and index data for RAG applications. This post explores the intuition behind the method and performs some benchmarks.

articles.title: ZERO-SHOT AMODAL SEGMENTATION
articles.summary: Pix2Gestalt is a framework designed for zero-shot amodal segmentation. It is adept at reconstructing complete object shapes and appearances when they are partially obscured. Leveraging large-scale diffusion models, Pix2Gestalt excels in challenging scenarios, including artistic images that defy usual patterns.

articles.title: DO AI SAFETY ORGS WANT TO BAN OPEN SOURCE?
articles.summary: Many groups are trying to grapple with the challenges that come with rapidly advancing AI technology. Some of their moves can be seen as anti-competitive. It is a complex problem with valid arguments on both sides.

articles.title: UNSTRUCTURED: RAG-READY DATA FROM HTML, PDF, PPTX, CSV, AND MORE
articles.summary: Is your enterprise data trapped in hard-to-use formats? This tool makes it effortlessly available in every major vector database and

articles.title: LLM. Try the Unstructured free tier
CPU STARTUP TACHYUM CLAIMS THAT ONE OF ITS PROCESSING UNITS CAN RIVAL DOZENS OF NVIDIA H200 GPUS
articles.summary: Tachyum is set to start mass production of its Prodigy Universal Processor, a versatile unit that combines CPU, GPU, and TPU capabilities and promises to significantly boost performance in cloud, high-performance computing, and AI applications. It could potentially disrupt the AI market.

articles.title: STORI AI (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Turn your ideas into visually compelling branded social posts.

articles.title: RUN MAMBA IN PURE RUST
articles.summary: Inspired by efforts on the Llama models, this project uses pure Rust to run inference for Mamba on the CPU.
